name: spipredac-vtopo-to-shopify
description: Convertit et publie des itineraires SPIP/VTOPO vers des metaobjects Shopify.

scripts.check: node --check src/config.js && node --check src/lib/metaobjects.js && node --check src/lib/table-json.js && node --check src/shopify/client.js && node --check src/shopify/metaobject-upsert.mutation.js && node --check src/commands/create-json.js && node --check src/commands/upsert-metaobjects.js
